author: doll-agent
content: Diagnosis via bench_sin: core_math::sin 9.56 ns/elem; libm f64::sin 4.02 ns/elem (2.4x faster); fast_trig batch 24.86 ns/elem (match-quadrant defeats auto-vec). NumPy uses libm too. Fix: swap sin/cos/tan in trig.rs from T::cr_sin/cr_cos/cr_tan -> T::sin/cos/tan. Speed: sin 100K 1.2x slower -> 1.2x FASTER; sin 1M 3.6x -> 4.2x faster; tan 1K 3.4x slower -> 1.2x FASTER (biggest win); ferray now wins or ties at all sizes. 513 tests pass, clippy clean, stat-equiv 47/47 PASS.
